# Tennis Coach Riviera — llms.txt
# https://tenniscoachriviera.com/
# Last updated: 2026-07-17

## About

Tennis Coach Riviera is a private tennis coaching service on the French Riviera (Côte d'Azur), operated by Massimo Bettini. The coach travels directly to the client's location — private villas, luxury hotels, resorts and residences. Available 7 days a week, morning and afternoon. One of the few coaches on the Riviera offering lessons in three languages (French, English, Italian) with a single coach, rather than requiring different staff per language.

## Coach

- Name: Massimo Bettini
- Certification: FITP IS1 and IS2 (Italian Tennis Federation, 2nd level; French recognition in progress)
- Experience: 10+ years at Tennis Palladio 98, Vicenza (Italy)
- ATP Challenger: Operational coordinator, Internazionali di Tennis Città di Vicenza 2023–2026
- Languages: French, English, Italian
- Based in: Nice, Alpes-Maritimes, France
- SIRET: 100 929 876 00017

## Services

- Private tennis lessons at home (villa, hotel, residence)
- Individual lessons: adults, beginners, seniors
- Junior and children coaching
- Family sessions (multi-level, one coach)
- Group lessons (2–3 players)
- 10-lesson packs for residents
- Hotel and resort concierge coaching service
- Court arrangement: in Valbonne and Mougins, a partner club court can be arranged for clients without private court access

## Service Areas

Nice, Antibes, Cannes, Monaco, Valbonne, Sophia Antipolis, Mougins, Biot, Cap Ferrat, Beaulieu-sur-Mer, Èze, Menton, Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat, Roquebrune-Cap-Martin

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +33 6 36 04 77 22
- Email: massimo@tenniscoachriviera.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tenniscoachriviera/
- Google Business: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Tennis+Coach+Riviera

## Reviews

18 verified Google reviews, 5.0/5 rating (as of June 2026). Check Google Business listing for current count.

## Languages

The website is available in French (primary), English and Italian, with a JavaScript language switcher on the homepage, city pages and about page, and separate translated articles for each blog post. Coaching is delivered in the client's preferred language — French, English or Italian, by the same coach.
